other_findings.finding: Microenvironment 2 is a Myeloid/Megakaryocyte-erythroid enriched microenvironment in prenatal skin

evidence_quotes.quote: Why are B progenitors and HSCs in the skin? This is likely a contamination with fetal liver or bone marrow, which are the only organs that harbour these precursor and progenitor cells.
evidence_quotes.context: Reviewer question about presence of HSPCs in skin

evidence_quotes.quote: Our prenatal skin samples were dissected by the trained staff at the Human Developmental Biology Resource (HDBR) based in Newcastle and London
evidence_quotes.context: Authors defending sample integrity against contamination concerns
